frontmatter.title: Hilton Aqua Sol
frontmatter.description: Photos from our stay at the Hilton Aqua Sol Resort in Winter Garden, Florida — pool days, s'mores nights, and the moments that made it our favorite place to stay.

photos.alt: A woman in a white lace cover-up holds a young child wearing a blue and green life jacket by the resort pool, with palm trees and patio furniture in the background
photos.caption: Poolside hugs in the life jacket — ready to hit the water.

photos.alt: Families swim in the resort pool near lounge chairs and a pool rules sign
photos.caption: Pool time — the kids could spend all day in here.

photos.alt: Children and adults play with a large colorful beach ball in the resort pool in front of palm trees and hotel balconies
photos.caption: Beach ball in the pool — simple fun that kept everyone entertained.

photos.alt: Kids splash and play with a beach ball in the resort pool
photos.caption: The beach ball game was nonstop — splash, throw, repeat.

photos.alt: An adult stands in the resort pool beside a young child in a green flotation vest, with a pool rules sign and lounge chairs behind them
photos.caption: Afternoon swim — the pool rules sign was a constant reminder that there's no lifeguard on duty.

photos.alt: Guests swim in the main Hilton Aqua Sol pool with resort balconies and flowering bushes visible behind them
photos.caption: The main pool on a sunny afternoon — the water was perfect.

photos.alt: A smiling man rides a red mobility scooter along the resort sidewalk near parked cars and palm trees
photos.caption: Getting around the resort — the scooter was a lifesaver for covering ground.

photos.alt: A girl in a red, white, and blue swimsuit smiles while holding marshmallow skewers outside the resort
photos.caption: Skewers ready — someone's prepping for s'mores night.

photos.alt: A smiling girl in a patriotic red, white, and blue swimsuit holds several long roasting sticks in a wet resort parking area with parked cars and palm trees behind her
photos.caption: Armed with skewers and ready for s'mores — the post-rain pavement still drying.

photos.alt: Kids wrapped in pool towels roast marshmallows on skewers beside the resort pool at night
photos.caption: S'mores night by the pool — the perfect way to end a pool day.

photos.alt: A man and several children gathered around the poolside grill at night roasting marshmallows on long skewers
photos.caption: Gathered around the grill — the kids took s'mores very seriously.

photos.alt: An adult holds a tired child in a green flotation vest beside the resort pool at night
photos.caption: Winding down poolside after an evening swim — the little ones were fading fast.

photos.alt: A young woman in a white cover-up holds a child in a green and blue flotation vest near the resort pool at night, with tropical landscaping and patio furniture behind them
photos.caption: Poolside cuddles at night — the flotation vest stayed on even after the swim.

photos.alt: A shirtless boy with wet hair wrapped in a blue-striped towel holds a giant marshmallow on a stick on the resort pool deck at dusk, with resort buildings, a vending machine, and palm trees behind him
photos.caption: Giant marshmallow, towel wrapped tight — this kid had the s'mores thing dialed in.

photos.alt: A girl wrapped in a striped towel holds a s'more while sitting on a patio chair beside the resort pool at night
photos.caption: S'more in hand, towel wrapped tight — the post-swim ritual.

photos.alt: A girl holding a toasted marshmallow on a skewer stands beside the resort pool at night
photos.caption: Toasted marshmallows under the pool lights — a perfect Florida evening.

photos.alt: A girl makes a silly face during a nighttime poolside gathering at the resort
photos.caption: Poolside silliness after dark — the kids were having the time of their lives.

photos.alt: A girl sits on the resort room couch holding an ice cream cone after a swim day
photos.caption: Ice cream on the couch — the post-pool cooldown.

photos.alt: Two children relax on the resort room couch eating ice cream cones
photos.caption: Two kids, two ice cream cones, zero complaints.

photos.alt: A young boy eating a chocolate-dipped ice cream cone inside the resort room
photos.caption: Chocolate-dipped cone — gone in about thirty seconds.

photos.alt: A young boy enjoying an ice cream cone in the resort room with family members in the background
photos.caption: Ice cream break in the suite — everyone got one.

photos.alt: Close-up of a young child eating a chocolate-dipped ice cream cone in the resort room
photos.caption: That chocolate-dipped cone was the highlight of the evening.
